metadata.name: ai.quickdeploy/airtable
metadata.title: Airtable
metadata.description: Generated Airtable Web API Records read-only OpenAPI MCP catalog manifest.

baseUrl.description: Airtable Web API base URL, e.g. https://api.airtable.com.

notes: Airtable does not publish a downloadable OpenAPI file; its official Web API reference pages (https://airtable.com/developers/web/api/*) embed the full OpenAPI 3.1.0 document (title "Airtable API") client-side.

The raw HTML response is not a stable pin point (each response embeds a fresh per-request CSP nonce), so the digest above is computed over the canonical (sorted-keys, compact) JSON serialization of the embedded `openApi` spec object, extracted from the page.

Verified byte-identical (same SHA-256) across two separate fetches of https://airtable.com/developers/web/api/list-records and against https://airtable.com/developers/web/api/get-record, confirming the embedded spec itself is the stable artifact.
Verified source SHA-256 (canonical JSON of the embedded spec): 493d9baa0c43ae01e11b1ca01b3c1fa6164702556da9e5ba8455eb316d1d3814
Airtable's primary documented auth method (Personal Access Token) is used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header; this manifest models auth accordingly (env ref only, no literal secrets).
The committed manifest selects read-only Airtable Web API record list/get operations only (list-records, get-record).

process: Run pnpm build/test scripts only inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
Run node only as invoked by generated project package scripts inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
